Title: Oxia has an OIDC token audience validation bypass via SkipClientIDCheck
Description: The OIDC authentication provider unconditionally sets `SkipClientIDCheck: true` in the `go-oidc` verifier configuration, disabling the standard audience (`aud`) claim validation at the library level. This allows tokens issued for unrelated services by the same OIDC issuer to be accepted by Oxia.
